install_tell: docker run -p 8000:8000 surrealdb/surrealdb:latest start --log debug --user root --pass root memory
misconfig_patterns: No --auth flag in pre-2.x versions — all endpoints accessible without credentials
Default root:root credentials in quickstart deployments
vector<float,N> schema columns detectable via SHOW TABLES
431 IPs observed in live population, 13% confirmed unauth

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must begin with surrealdb- version string

deployment_tells: SQL endpoint POST /sql accepts queries without auth in pre-2.x
vector<float,N> type in schema indicates AI workload
pivot_paths: GET /version → version string for CVE matching
POST /sql INFO FOR DB; → namespace/table list without auth (pre-2.x)
POST /sql SHOW TABLES; → detect vector<float,N> columns
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed; 431 IPs, 13% unauth]
